message:
Update create command test for type rejection behavior

Rename test_create_issue_custom_type to test_create_issue_invalid_type_rejected
and update assertions to expect failure when an invalid/unknown type is
provided.

This aligns the create command tests with the new FromStr behavior that
rejects unrecognized issue types for bd conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
